titleStmt.title: SII 18.293: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 293. (B.K. No. 51 of 1932-33.) GUTTAL, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab lying on the platform of a neem tree in front of the temple of Chenna Kēśava (also called Sūrya-Nārāyaṇa).

summary.p: This mutilated inscription refers to Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vikramādityarasa as governing Ponnavatti Twelve, Beḷuhuge Seventy and Beṇṇeyūru Twelve, and is dated in Śaka 10[84] • • • • • Pus11hya śu. 15, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti. In Śaka 1084, expired, corresponding to the cyclic year Chitrabhānu, the given details work out to Sunday, December 23, A.D. 1162; the Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa occurred on the following Tuesday, i.e., 25th December. It records the gift of land made to the temple of [Pārśvadēva] built by Vaḍḍavyarahāri Kētiseṭṭi. The gift is stated to have been made for the feeding of ascetics and for the repairs of the temple. Maladhāridēva of Pustaka-gachchha and Sōmēśvara-Paṇḍita are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
janavinyastamasta
da samastavidyāvi
lōcanaṁ mi garājalāṁ
mārttaṇḍavairika ḷakāḷadaṇḍaha
draguptamahārājādhirā
krabhūcakraśakrahara
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara vi
kramādityarasaṁ ponnavatti panneraḍuṁ beḷuhuge yeḷpattuṁ beṇneyūrurppa nneraḍumaṁ duṣanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁdāḷdu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralu . tatpraṇūtapada yugaḷaru . surabhū jaṁ jeḍeyottuda ba di tapōvēṣakkaḍarpāyto maṁdaThe letters pada are engraved above the line in smaller characters.
raśaiḷaṁbratarūpamaṁ taḷedudeṁbantatyudāratvadiṁ varagabhīrateyiṁ viniścaḷateyiṁ sōmēśvaraṁ sanmunīśvaracūḍāmaṇi tāne raṁjisida
paṁ viśvaṁbarābāgadoḷa . varavāṇī�syalīla śa(sa)danamanu syāṁbujaṁ mugdhacaṁdrābharaṇa śīrājahaṁśāśrayamamalava nō
mānasaṁ cāru rāsiya taḷedaṁ kīrttiyaṁ sōmēśvarayōgīndraṁ vipaściṁnikarahridayanīḷābji
nīprauḍhacandraṁ . E samiticakōrēnduvenelepogaḷa(ḷe) sōma
dēvabratiyaṁ . dēvara sthānadācāryyaru sōmēśvarapaṁḍitadēvaru dharmmakkanukū
larāgalu . jana madāsi tanūja pārśvanāthaṁ ta
nagiṣṭādeyvamadhikō tiḷaka guṇagaṇaviditaṁ kētiseṭṭi . ©
dharmmada mēru dānada tavarmmane subuddhi vivēkamūrtti duḥkarmmavi
varjjitaṁ jinapadāṁbuja kētiseṭṭiyaṁ . svasti samastaguṇasaṁ
panna nuḍidu mattenna gōtrapavitra sāhasōttuṁga soṁdevaṁsalalāmanabhimā
narāma jinasameyasamuddharaṇa cūḍāmaṇi Ityādi nāmāvaḷīvirā
jitanappa śrīmatu vaḍḍabyavahāri sipārśvadēvara pratiṣṭeyaṁ mā
ḍisidaḍe śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ yāhāradānakkaṁ khaṇḍasphu
ṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkendu sakavarśa 1084 saṁvatsarada pauṣa suddha pu
ṇname sōmavāra vuttarāyaṇasaṁkrā dānvayada pustakagacchada
sammandhada maladhāridēvara śiṣya keṟeya ke
ḷage gaddekamma 20 guttēsvaradēvara pe da deseya
lu kisukāḍu mattaroṁdu kalkeṟeya taḷada
baṇajigaroḷagāgi samasta dēsigaḷa na bhatta
maṁ koṭṭaru . telligaru gāṇadalli pratipāḷisidavaru gaṁge vā
raṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāge ponnalu kaṭṭisi
sāsirvva caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge koṭṭaphalamakku Ī dha
rmmamanaḷidātanā tīrttha radattāṁ vā yō ha
harētivasundharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa tē viṣaThis letter ha is redundant.
mēkākinō hanti dēvasvaṁ
bhāginaḥ pārtthivē sva
putraṁ The remaining
Digital edition of SII 18.293 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
